template_data.quote_html: The fastest path into federal contracting isn't the prime seat.

image_prompt: Split-panel infographic. Left panel dark navy, bold label 'WRONG QUESTION' with red X icon, three 2-word myth labels below in muted text: 'NO RESUME', 'NO HISTORY', 'WAIT LONGER'. Right panel cream/white, bold label 'RIGHT QUESTION' with green upward arrow, three 2-word action labels: 'FIND PRIME', 'STRUCTURE DEAL', 'YEAR ONE WIN'. Center: illustrated professional woman in blazer shaking hands with taller suited figure, crossing from dark to light panel. Bold headline top: 'WRONG QUESTION. RIGHT STRATEGY.' Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
